name: CWF-620 Audience Feedback Aggregator Canonical
description: Aggregates audience feedback: comments, sentiment analysis, topic trending.

parameters.jsCode: const feedback = { total_comments: Math.floor(Math.random() * 500) + 50, avg_sentiment_score: (Math.random() * 0.8 + 0.1).toFixed(3), positive_ratio: (Math.random() * 0.6 + 0.3).toFixed(3), negative_ratio: (Math.random() * 0.2 + 0.05).toFixed(3), neutral_ratio: (Math.random() * 0.3 + 0.15).toFixed(3), trending_topics: ['topic_1', 'topic_2', 'topic_3'], sentiment_distribution: { positive: Math.floor(Math.random() * 300) + 50, neutral: Math.floor(Math.random() * 200) + 30, negative: Math.floor(Math.random() * 80) + 10 } }; return [{ json: { ...$json, audience_feedback: feedback, feedback_aggregated_at: new Date().toISOString() } }];

const packet = { instance_id: 'FDBK-' + Date.now(), artifact_family: 'audience_feedback_packet', schema_version: '1.0.0', producer_workflow: 'CWF-620', dossier_ref: $json.dossier_id || 'DOSSIER-UNSPECIFIED', created_at: new Date().toISOString(), status: 'CREATED', payload: { feedback_aggregated: true, total_comments: $json.audience_feedback.total_comments, avg_sentiment_score: parseFloat($json.audience_feedback.avg_sentiment_score), positive_ratio: parseFloat($json.audience_feedback.positive_ratio), negative_ratio: parseFloat($json.audience_feedback.negative_ratio), neutral_ratio: parseFloat($json.audience_feedback.neutral_ratio), trending_topics: $json.audience_feedback.trending_topics, sentiment_distribution: $json.audience_feedback.sentiment_distribution } }; return [{ json: { ...$json, audience_feedback_packet: packet, packet_emitted: true } }];
return [{ json: { ...$json, cwf620_result: { status: 'COMPLETED', audience_feedback_packet: $json.audience_feedback_packet, payload: { feedback_aggregated: true } } } }];
